titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abd Al-Rahman Ibn Kathir Al-Hashimi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abd Al-Rahman Ibn Kathir Al-Hashimi

segments: ه عن عبد الرّحمن بن كثير الهاشميّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن عليّ بن حسّان الواسطيّ‌ عن عمّه عبد الرّحمن بن كثير الهاشميّ.
arabic.text: ه عن عبد الرّحمن بن كثير الهاشميّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن عليّ بن حسّان الواسطيّ‌ عن عمّه عبد الرّحمن بن كثير الهاشميّ.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abd Al-Rahman ibn Kathir Al-Hashimi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Ali ibn Hassan Al-Wasiti, from his uncle Abd Al-Rahman ibn Kathir Al-Hashimi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abd Al-Rahman ibn Kathir Al-Hashimi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Ali ibn Hassan Al-Wasiti, from his uncle Abd Al-Rahman ibn Kathir Al-Hashimi.
